---
title: "About J.J. Humenay"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
---

Hello my name is J.J. Humenay and I am a senior at St. Lawrence University majoring in Economics with a minor in Statistics. This blog was created to showcase my work in STAT 334.
